gist.headline: Now scoring: CINESONICS
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! CINESONICS lets you generate cinematic soundtrack concepts, complete with tracklists and album covers, just by describing a movie vibe.
gist.summary: Added CINESONICS to the community app showcase, a tool for generating cinematic soundtrack concepts from movie descriptions.
gist.impact: Creators can now easily generate AI-crafted tracklists and album covers for their imaginary films.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about CINESONICS, an app for cinematic soundtracks. Visuals should combine movie elements (clapperboards, film) with audio elements (records, speakers). Polly the bee acts as a film composer or director.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a clapperboard next to a retro record player spinning a vinyl soundtrack. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head displays a cinematic movie poster. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
